title: Why we're sticking with Alphabet despite an imperfect quarter and more AI spending
summary: The market isn't in a forgiving mood, but we're not in a hurry to leave this stock behind.

title: Moonshot AI accessed Nvidia's chips despite Chinese export ban, White House official says
summary: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.

title: Google slapped with $1 billion fine under landmark EU digital law
summary: European regulators fined Google 890 million euros ($1 billion) alleging the company gives preferential treatment to its own services.

title: Tesla and Alphabet shares slump as AI spending concerns spook investors
summary: Both Tesla and Alphabet signaled higher spending as they invest in artificial intelligence.

title: Chip firm priced as China's most valuable company before its IPO brings scrutiny to crypto platform
summary: The outsized premium was due in part to offshore investors who, locked out of the highly anticipated listings, turned to crypto for a parallel market.

title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
summary: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports.
